Gear & Tools.Name: Demiurg Drone/turret Controller
Gear & Tools.Description: To activate a drone controller, a character must make a Challenging (+0) Tech-Use Test, which requires Two Full Actions. Once activated, the drone controller remains calibrated to the user until he stops using it; if given to another user, however, the new user must recalibrate the device. A character with a drone controller is typically also assigned one drone, which must remain within 50 metres of the drone controller to stay properly attuned to its signals. This drone follows the character with the controller and obey simple orders (such as using the Move Action to keep up with him, shielding him from harm with the Guardian Talent, and making Attack Actions against targets he designates). Rather than having their own Initiative, drones act immediately after their controller’s Turn in Structured Time. Once per Round, as a Half Action or Reaction, a character with a drone controller may make a Routine (+20) Tech-Use Test to assume personal control over one drone. Until the end of the Round, that drone uses its handler’s Ballistic Skill instead of its own.

If a character fails the Test, his Agility Bonus is reduced by 1d5 for the purposes of movement until the end of his next Turn; if he fails with three or more Degrees of Failure, he is knocked Prone.

Gear & Tools.Description: When filled: spend FP to summon. If Beast is above level 29, % chance of failure.

Gear & Tools.Name: Greater Prism
Gear & Tools.Description: When filled: spend FP to summon. If Beast is above level 49, % chance of failure. WP+10 for Captures

Gear & Tools.Name: Ultra Prism
Gear & Tools.Description: When filled: spend FP to summon. If Beast is above level 69, % chance of failure. WP+20 for Captures

Gear & Tools.Name: Master Prism
Gear & Tools.Description: When filled: spend FP to summon. WP+60 for Captures.

Gear & Tools.Name: Harmonic Prism
Gear & Tools.Description: As Prism, but (reportedly) requires ongoing assent from the creature to maintain the binding

Gear & Tools.Name: Kalovan Warpstone
Gear & Tools.Description: Acquired with subtypes drawn from the Kalovan Beast type list. Used as part of ritual to mutate KBs; those with evolutionary forms will advance, but all KBs have chance to learn 1 new move.

Gear & Tools.Name: TM #XXX
Gear & Tools.Description: Black prism that monsters absorb through their skin. Grants specific techniques to eligible monsters. One-time use.

Gear & Tools.Name: Mysterious "Candy"
Gear & Tools.Description: Beast automatically gains 1 level. Beast tests WP-10*sum total of candies used. On failure, addicted to candy and must consume 1/mo or regress 1 level. Addiction can be cured by de-leveling once and testing against addiction again. If Beast regresses below 1, or if candies are used to level to 100 or greater, some interesting things might happen...

Gear & Tools.Name: Max Revive
Gear & Tools.Description: Beast controller injects into self. Beast is restored to full wounds with 0 fatigue. Controller tests T or gains 1 Corruption, 1 Insanity, and 1d5 Fatigue

Gear & Tools.Name: Moldy Sandwich
Gear & Tools.Description: Held item. Beast gains Regeneration(X), where X is 0.1*Max Wounds (rounded up)

Gear & Tools.Name: Psychoactive Clay
Gear & Tools.Description: Held item. Beast adds +2m and +2 reduction to screens created with Reflect or Light Screen

Gear & Tools.Name: Everstone
Gear & Tools.Description: Held item. Boosts ‘mon stats by 20/10 if the mon has 2/1 higher evolved stages. Prevents evolution.

Drugs.Name: Desoleum Fungus
Drugs.During: can invert result of any 1d100 roll during duration

Drugs.Name: Frenzon
Drugs.During: temporarily gain Frenzy talent; gain Frenzied condition

Drugs.Name: Ration Pack
Drugs.After: Eating during rest period of at least 2 hours removes +1 level of fatigue

Drugs.Name: Sacred Unguents
Drugs.Immediate: immediately clear a jam (but with no further effect)
Drugs.During: weapon is immune to jamming for shots = clip size
Drugs.Description: Full Action to apply to weapon; choose Immediate or Duration effect when applying

Drugs.Name: Slaught
Drugs.After: T+0 or -20 to Agi and Per for 1d5hr

Drugs.Name: Spook
Drugs.During: grants a psychic power from T5-16 (p. 174); FP tests are made at PR 1.
Drugs.Description: Test WP+0 or gain 1d5 IP; Characters with PR using must also test WP+0; on fail gain 1 IP, on pass +1 PR and +25 to Psy Phenom

Drugs.Name: Stimm
Drugs.During: Ignores negative effects to characteristics from damage, crit damage, and Fatigue; also cannot be Stunned
Drugs.After: suffers -20 to Str/T/A test afterward for 1hr and gains 1 Fatigue

Drugs.Name: Accelerai
Drugs.During: May make an extra attack when performing the Multiple Attacks Action
Drugs.After: +1 fatigue and T+0 or -5 Init for 1d5 days
Drugs.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

Drugs.Name: Corpse Obmulen
Drugs.After: +1 fatigue and S-10 or 1d10 Str dmg for 1 day or until another dose
Drugs.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

Drugs.Name: Eviscerine
Drugs.After: +1 fatigue and T-10 or lose Reaction in combat for 1d10hr or another dose
Drugs.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

Drugs.Name: Murder's Boon
Drugs.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

Drugs.Name: Shudderstep
Drugs.After: +1 fatigue and T+0 or pass out for 1d10+5m
Drugs.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

Drugs.Name: Slitherbind
Drugs.Immediate: 1 ftg per pt of PR (up to DoF)

PsyPwrs.Name: Powa' Burst
PsyPwrs.Effects: Roll 1d100 and cast a random Ork psychic power based on the result

PsyPwrs.Name: Frazzle
PsyPwrs.Effects: For each DoS after the first this attack may affect another additional target within 3m of the original for half damage. May not be Dodged by non-primary targets
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: Up an' at 'Em
PsyPwrs.Effects: All allied Orks within range ignore effects of Fatigue, gain bonus equal to 5*PR (max +30) to all tests to resist pinning and fear as well as reroll any rolls they must make on the Shock table.
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: Warpath
PsyPwrs.Effects: Allied Orks within radius gain bonus to melee damage equal to 1/2 PR rounded up. Each allied Ork within range may also reroll one failed WS test per round.
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: Dis is Takin' Too Long!
PsyPwrs.Effects: May immediately make a Run or Charge action as a FrA, increasing the maximum range of this move by an extra 2m for every DoS on the FP test. On a vehicle or voidship may instead use this power to grant any explorer on board a bonus equal to 5*PR on the next test that increases the vehicle's speed
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: Smash da Gitz
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: We'z Gotta be Lucky
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: Zzap
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: Ere We Go
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: Deff Wave
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: Krump 'Em All
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: Ead to 'Ead
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

PsyPwrs.Name: I'z Gunna Squig Ya!
PsyPwrs.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

Cybernetics etc.Name: Augur Array
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): implanted Augur Array
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): P: single detection(either heat, radiation, emag) up to 20m. G: full auspex, can reroll all failed Perception-based tests

Cybernetics etc.Name: Autosanguine
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Always considered Lightly Damaged when healing. Heals 2dmg per day.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Baleful Eye
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Replaces an eye. Hot-shot laspistol with 10m range. No clip size, but jams cause loss of sight for rounds = DoF

Cybernetics etc.Name: Bionic Arms
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Replaces a lost arm
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): P: halve Agi (rounded up) for fine dexterity, WS/BS -5 using arm; G: +10 Agi for fine dexterity; B: as G, and +10 Str tests using the arm

Cybernetics etc.Name: Bionic Heart
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Replaces the heart
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): G/B: +1 Armor to Body (stacks) and Sprint talent

Cybernetics etc.Name: Bionic Legs
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Replaces a lost leg
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): P: Mv-1 and Agi+10 when running or fall prone; G: Spring and +20 Agi for jump/leap

Cybernetics etc.Name: Bionic Respiratory System
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Augments respiratory system. +20 to T vs airborne toxins and gas
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): P: -20 to Stealth (loud); G: full life support system (can function if organs fail) and can be discreet/unnoticable

Cybernetics etc.Name: Bionic Senses
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Replaces lost Eyes, Ears, or Nose
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): P: -20 to tests using the sense; G: +10 to tests using the sense and +20 to resist attacks on the sense itself. Can also incorporate magnifying lesnes, photo-visor, microbead, or Dark-sight trait (separate requisition to add on)

Cybernetics etc.Name: Calculus Logi Upgrade
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Grants +10 to Literacy, Logic, and SL tests

Cybernetics etc.Name: Cerebral Implants
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Alleviate brain damage(-1d10 WS, BS, A, I, F)
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): P: destroy personality and memories(as servitor); G: Unnatural Int(2) and +20 to Logic and Lore. Is Near Unique

Cybernetics etc.Name: Cranial Armor
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Armor+1 to Head. Stacks with other armor.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Enhanced Potentia Coil
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Improves all Maglev and Luminen abilities. See the entry in The Lathe Worlds pg. 66

Cybernetics etc.Name: Ferric Lure Implants
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Can, as FuA and WP+0, call unsecured metal object to hand. Cannot mass more than 1kg per WPB and must be within 20m.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Interface Port
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Can connect to machines using body port. Grants +10 to CL, Inquiry, and TU while connected to a relevant system.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Internal Reservoir
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): No longer gain Fatigue from using Luminen Capacitors to recharge or attack, but each use depletes this resevoir by half. Restores to full after 1 day or resting

Cybernetics etc.Name: Lathes Mechadendrite Stabilisers
Cybernetics etc.Requirements: Mechanicus Implants Trait, Mechadendrite Use(Utility) talent
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): HA to activate/deactivate. Braced, gain Sturdy, and ignore modifiers to movement due to gravity or uncertain stability. Grants +20 to climbing.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Locator Matrix
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): User is aware of planetary poles direction, present location, relative velocity, altitude, time of day, and other valuable info.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Luminen Capacitor
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Allows character to charge devices or blast things. Requires 1m and Toughness test depending on device. See DE Core pg. 183.
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): P: -10 to all Toughness tests using this augment; G: +10 to all Toughness tests made using this augment

Cybernetics etc.Name: Maglev Coils
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Half Action to hover 20-30cm off of the ground for mins = to 1d10+TB. Must use HA each round to concentrate. Can slow fall, reducing fall damage to max 1d10+3 Impact. Activation drains coils and they can't be used for 24 hours.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Mechadendrite
Cybernetics etc.Requirements: Mechanicus Implants Trait, Mechadendrite Use talent(s)
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Come in Ballistic, Manipulator, Medicae, or Optical varieties. See DE Core p. 183

Cybernetics etc.Name: Memorance Implant
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Neurally-linked datavault and pict-capture system. Grants +10 to Trade(Loremancer) or other social tests where recorded information can be of value

Cybernetics etc.Name: Mind Impulse Unit (MIU)
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Can directly link to a tech device. Grants +10 to Tech-Use or Operate tests used in conjunction with MIU-linked devices
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): P: WP+0 to use and -10 penalty to interfacing device; G: +10 to interface and for Tech-Use, Operate, Logic, Inquiry, and BS tests made through the MIU.

Cybernetics etc.Name: MIU Weapon Interface
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Can fire a linked ranged weapon as FrA during turn (usually shoulder mounted)

Cybernetics etc.Name: Perinetus-Pattern Servo-Harness
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Counts as Manipulator and Utility mechadendrite, combi-tool, Fyceline Torch(standard Flamer), and Plasma Cutter(can burn through meter of adamantine plating per minute, and as Plasma Pistol w/ range 10m). Grants Flyer(6) in Null Gravity. Can use Reaction to make a single attack with any of this harness' weapons.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Respiratory Filter Implant
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Grants +20 to resist inhaled poisons, gas, or atmospheric toxins.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Scribe-Tines
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Grants +10 to all Lore skill tests

Cybernetics etc.Name: Subskin Armor
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Grants +2 Armor to Arms, Body, and Legs. Stacks with other armor.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Synthmuscle
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Grants Unnatural Str(1)
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): B: Unnatural Str(4) but -10 on all Agi tests due to mishapen body.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Vocal Implant
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Can shout a lot. Functions as a Laud Hailer

Cybernetics etc.Name: Volitor Implant
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Can be coded to not reveal certain information, remain in a set area, or perform a specific task. Subjects forced to counter this coding shut down, falling unconscious or possibly dying.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Subskin Hologuard
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Gives the character the ability to activate Hologuard armor as a Reaction or Half Action. User takes 2 dmg ignoring A/T per round when this armor is violently disabled (e.g. via a Haywire effect)
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): Poor quality requires Full Action to activate. Good+ quality does not inflict damage when disabled.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Guildsight
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Gain +20 to all skill tests which use eyesight, as well as all Perception characteristic tests. Gain the Unnatural Perception(2), Unnatural Ballistic Skill(2), and Dark Sight traits. Gain the benefits of the Magnifying Lenses and Photovisor tools.
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): Guildsight orbs are custom-made for each user; orbs extracted from a different owner count as Poor, and thus lose the Unnatural Perception, Unnatural BS, and Dark sight traits.

Cybernetics etc.Name: Ironbone Transformation
Cybernetics etc.Effects(general): Gain Unnatural Toughness(3), Unnatural Str(3), and +3 dmg to all Unarmed Attacks.
Cybernetics etc.Effects(quality): Poor quality halves the character's Agility and adds 40 kg to the character's weight. Normal quality reduces Agility by 20 and adds 40 kg to their weight. Good quality reduces Agility by 10 and adds 30 kg to weight. Best quality adds 30 kg to weight and does not reduce Agility.

Services.Example: Hab capsule, grox barn, taproom hammock
Basic hab room, main cabin quarters, mid-hive hostelry
Grand hall lodgings, high berth billet, spire suite
Stickrats, fungus loaf, void sweat ale
Vatmeal cakes, grox stew, bowl of recaf
Jellied heffen tongue, vintage amasec, roast starfin cheek
Basic autocarriage, short-range cutter, intra-hive tramway
Orbital shuttle, dedicated autocarriage with driver, furnished palanquin
A hit. You're calling for an assassination
Services.Effect: Name a person in the Reach. They'll (likely) meet an unfortunate and sudden end...
Services.Notes: 1st use is free for House Abaoth

Services.Example: A targeted strike by an Ordo Malleus kill team.
Services.Effect: An Ordo Malleus kill team will be dispatched to eliminate a single daemonic (or daemonically-aligned) threat.
Services.Notes: Only accessible via Inquisitor Stefan's network. Must make an opposed FL(Ordo Malleus)-20 test to avoid discovery.

Services.Example: A targeted strike by an Ordo Malleus Grey Knight squad.
Services.Effect: An Ordo Malleus kill team will be dispatched to eliminate a single daemonic (or daemonically-aligned) threat.
Services.Notes: Only accessible via Inquisitor Stefan's network. Must make an opposed FL(Knights of Titan)-40 test to avoid discovery.

Services.Example: A targeted strike by an Ordo Malleus Grey Knight Terminator or Knight Paladin squad.
Services.Effect: An Ordo Malleus kill team will be dispatched to eliminate a single daemonic (or daemonically-aligned) threat.
Services.Notes: Only accessible via Inquisitor Stefan's network. Must make an opposed FL(Knights of Titan)-60 test to avoid discovery.

Unique Wpns.Name: Ame-no, Ward of the Peaks
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: All out attacks with this weapon cannot be parried; bearer gains Psy Rating 1 (this cannot be upgraded through normal means).
Unique Wpns.Description: An ancient, nearly unadorned katana-style blade. The steel is a shiny blue-grey and is completely free of defects. Carvings depicting a sinuous, winding serpent are traced along each side of the blade.

Unique Wpns.Name: Ancient Bolt-Action Rifle
Unique Wpns.Description: Originating from Holy Terra, this rifle is in very good condition for its age. Stamped as "Lee-Enfield Mk III." Exceedingly valuable.

Unique Wpns.Name: Anzion's Pseudogenitor
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: The bearer gains the benefit of the Lightning Attack talent with this weapon, even if they do not normally possess it. In addition, the bearer gains +20 to attack with this weapon. The bearer may attack with this weapon as a FrA on their turn (this attack still has the Attack keyword)
Unique Wpns.Description: TBD

Unique Wpns.Name: Archangel Mk II
Unique Wpns.Description: Burnished in bright and brilliant gold, with the barrel shaped to resemble an angel. The plasma it fires is tinged red and gold.

Unique Wpns.Name: Aspirant's Sanguinary Pistol
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: When a bearer with the Bonded in Blood Trait kills a target with this weapon while aboard or within FBx10 meters of their Bonded Ally, the Bonded Ally regains 1 FP. When fired by a character without the Bonded in Blood trait there may be different outcomes.
Unique Wpns.Description: An ancient but elegant Bolt Pistol artfully embossed w/ the iconography of the Blood Angels chapter as well as an inscribed, small logo of the Saiphan Elevatii on base of the hilt. An inscripted dedication runs along the side: "here, Service and Heroism have built Lineage and Legacy. Forwards, unto our Father's Future!"

Unique Wpns.Name: Aspirant's Sanguinary Boltgun
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: When a valid bearer (CB < 2; IB < 5; Human) kills a target with this weapon, they gain the benefits of the Bonded in Blood trait with one valid Ally within FBx10 meters until the end of the current encounter. Alledged to be indestructible.
Unique Wpns.Description: An ancient, weathered Boltgun simply inscribed with the logo of the Blood Angels. A battered, worn, and haphazard 'inscription' reads in High Gothic: "my Brother, even the Aspirants should not be able to break this one"

Unique Wpns.Name: Astartes Combi-Bolter
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Comes w/ Banestrike/Implosion/Dragonfire
Unique Wpns.Description: A massive and ancient combi-bolter pattern reportedly used during the Horus Heresy. Taken from what appears to have been a member of the heretical Alpha Legion, this weapon nonetheless appears to be untainted and in excellent condition.

Unique Wpns.Name: Brotherhood
Unique Wpns.Description: Oddly well-conditioned tau rifle with plastic bands wrapped around the barrel, each with the names of fire warriors

Unique Wpns.Name: Bulldog
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Mod-locked. Requires SB4 or higher to fire one-handed
Unique Wpns.Description: TBD

Unique Wpns.Name: Cerberus
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Requires SB4 or higher to fire one-handed. Can use any Solid Projectile ammo which fits a Hand Cannon.
Unique Wpns.Description: A triple-barreled, triple-cylindered revolver, ornamented with scrollwork patterns, a small dog's head in place of the iron sights on each barrel, and a silver chain in the shape of a three-headed dog with a wing hanging from the end of the grip.

Unique Wpns.Name: Claymore
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Mod-locked. Requires SB6 or higher to fire unbraced
Unique Wpns.Description: A truly massive shotgun. The weapon is artfully styled with gore-spatter blood patterns.

Unique Wpns.Name: Consort Honor-Blade(Las)
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Glaive that counts as Best-quality Power Axe and a las-style ranged weapon.
Unique Wpns.Description: Ornate and inscribed with etchings of some sort of human ceremony

Unique Wpns.Name: Consort Honor-Blade(Axe)
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Glaive that counts as Best-quality Power Axe and a las-style ranged weapon.
Unique Wpns.Description: Ornate and inscribed with etchings of some sort of human ceremony

Unique Wpns.Name: Culling
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Also functions as a scythe in melee (equiv to mono-spear). The bearer may burn a FP as a FuA and nominate a single target with Fate Points within range. That target is then marked until killed. The bearer knows whether he or she is on the same planet as or within 5 VU of the marked target, and can test the appropriate Very Hard Navigate(X) check as a HA to determine direction. As long as the bearer has a target marked (and that target is within range of the chosen power) they may spend a FP as a HA to cast either the Perfect Timing, Misfortune, and Scrier's Gaze powers with the marked character as the only target (Scrier's Gaze may only be cast on targets on the same planet as the bearer); these abilities are cast with a PR of 3. When the marked target is killed, you regain 1 FP slot.
Unique Wpns.Description: Colored bone-white and shaped out of some bone-like substance, this weapon radiates menace. The long and narrow barrel ends with a scythe-like blade that hangs down beneath.

Unique Wpns.Name: Da Rippa
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Each subsequent, consecutive firing increases the FA fire rate by 2; this is reset whenever the wielder goes a full round without firing the weapon. Best-quality when fired by Ork. (Overheats on 81+)
Unique Wpns.Description: A truly enormous device of Orkish manufacture; on one end of the device, scrawled in overly-large childish handwriting, is the phrase "dis end at da gits"

Unique Wpns.Name: Darloth Chain Cannon
Unique Wpns.Description: TBD

Unique Wpns.Name: Edge of Night
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Gains Felling(20) vs creatures with the Daemonic, Undying, or From Beyond traits. Creatures with the warp instability trait must immediately test against warp instability after taking damage from this weapon (with a penalty equal to the damage taken). May have additional effects against creatures bearing more unique warp curses...
Unique Wpns.Description: A mysterious sword whose edge folds in and out of hidden dimensions, sometimes appearing straight and honed to an invisible edge and other times spiralling impossibly around the blade. Its material is unknown, but it bears the signs of modifications made by others than the original creators.

Unique Wpns.Name: Elemental Assault
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: FireSel switches between the 3 Special Qualities. Infinite ammo.
Unique Wpns.Description: TBD

Unique Wpns.Name: Executor Bolt Pistol (Bolt)
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Includes needle pistol
Unique Wpns.Description: Emblazoned with the logo of the Imperial Inquisition

Unique Wpns.Name: Executor Bolt Pistol (Needle)
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Includes bolt pistol
Unique Wpns.Description: Emblazoned with the logo of the Imperial Inquisition

Unique Wpns.Name: Hand of Retribution
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: This is a small circular device that fits neatly into the palm of the hand and is easily concealable (+30 on any tests to hide). When the hand is opened however the device sprouts a thin blade of shimmering power, counting as a Best craftsmanship power weapon
Unique Wpns.Description: This is a small circular device that fits neatly into the palm of the hand and is easily concealable. When the hand is opened however the device sprouts a thin blade of shimmering power

Unique Wpns.Name: Khanite Chainblade
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Aesthetic Alterations (very pretty). Appears to react to blood and gore...
Unique Wpns.Description: Sinuous, indigo-shading-into-violet guards, with silvery teeth. It is strangely, betwitchingly beautiful.

Unique Wpns.Name: Kusanagi, Voice of the Wind
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Bearer has a 70% force field with no overload that can only be used versus attacks outside of melee range. bearer gains Psy Rating 1 (this cannot be upgraded through normal means).
Unique Wpns.Description: An ancient, nearly unadorned katana-style blade. The steel is a shiny blue-grey and is completely free of defects. Carvings depicting a sinuous, winding serpent are traced along each side of the blade.

Unique Wpns.Name: Masamune, Spirit of the Warrior
Unique Wpns.Description: An ancient, nearly unadorned katana-style blade. The steel is a shiny blue-grey and is completely free of defects. Carvings depicting a sinuous, winding serpent are traced along each side of the blade.

Unique Wpns.Name: Midnight Essence
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Righteous Fury adds the Graviton quality to the attack, but may have additional effects on the user...
Unique Wpns.Description: A large, jet-black alien weapon with persistent wavy curvature and striking sharpened edges; silvery alien blades are also positioned like monstrous teeth along its barrel and sides. The weapon constantly feels warm to the touch, and any who spend much time near this weapon might swear they see something else moving in the shining reflections off its inky black surface.

Unique Wpns.Name: Modified Inferno Pistol
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Mod-locked
Unique Wpns.Description: A puzzlingly-complex combined pair of inferno pistols.

Unique Wpns.Name: Prismatic Fist(Las)
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Can be fired alone or with both other Prismatic Fist weapons as a Half Action
Unique Wpns.Description: TBD

Unique Wpns.Name: Prismatic Fist(Melta)
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Can be fired alone or with both other Prismatic Fist weapons as a Half Action
Unique Wpns.Description: TBD

Unique Wpns.Name: Prismatic Fist(Plasma)
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Can be fired alone or with both other Prismatic Fist weapons as a Half Action
Unique Wpns.Description: TBD

Unique Wpns.Name: Da Rally Flagg
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Grants the bearer access to the Dis iz Takin' Too Long! and 'Ere We Go powers from the Weirdboy psychic discipline. When the bearer triggers psychic phenomea while wielding this weapon psychic phenomea are chosen from the Weird Fings and 'Eadbang tables instead of the standard. May have additional benefits when used in conjunction with a vehicular challenge/engagement...
Unique Wpns.Description: A large coppa staff topped with a brass Orkoid mushroom. Has an attached hand-stitched checkered flag made out of dyed squig leather.

Unique Wpns.Name: Shadowglass
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: This weapon can, allegedly, destroy or separate an Egarian mentat from its host. It seems fragile, as if it might have limited uses...
Unique Wpns.Description: An impossibly-sharp fragment of some strange glass-like substance bound to a crude wrought-iron hilt. Mysterious shapes seem to move into and out of the glass, as if it was still part of some greater whole...

Unique Wpns.Name: Sturm und Drang
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: (Sturm-final shot in clip deals an additional 1d10 damage)(Drang-Righteous Fury crits are at +2 on CD table)
Unique Wpns.Description: A pair of ancient pistols, lovingly maintained and rebuilt over the years. These pistols match descriptions of ancient Terran weapons from before the Age of Strife.

Unique Wpns.Name: Svalinndar
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: AP 8 Arm/Body
Unique Wpns.Description: An ancient iron and wood shield, with carven and filagreed figures from ancient Skald lore. The shield is persistently rimmed with frost, and is always bitingly cold to the touch.

Unique Wpns.Name: The Black Hand
Unique Wpns.Description: A massive, black, scaled gauntlet running from the upper arm down to a wicked clawed grip

Unique Wpns.Name: The Twin Dragons
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Twinned (Dmg-2, Pen-2 w/o both guns)
Unique Wpns.Description: A golden pistol with a barrel carved and ornamented to look like a dragon's mouth. The name "Nite Ell" is carved into the hilt

Unique Wpns.Name: Voidblade
Unique Wpns.Description: A pair of impossibly thin blades which curve out from opposite ends of the grip. They appear to phase in and out of existence. The hilt is an unknown, oily looking metal which glows slightly.
Unique Wpns.Discovery Location: Looted from Antigonius aux Sextus on Hadria

Unique Wpns.Name: Volkite Disruptor
Unique Wpns.Description: A powerful pistol that bears striking similarity to an ancient Horus Heresy pattern weapon used by both traitor and loyalist Astartes. This weapon is either incredibly well-maintained and modified or recently designed and constructed based on the older patterns.

Unique Wpns.Name: Zennyo, Soul of the Depths
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Fighting defensively grants you an immediate standard attack as a FrA. bearer gains Psy Rating 1 (this cannot be upgraded through normal means).
Unique Wpns.Description: An ancient, nearly unadorned katana-style blade. The steel is a shiny blue-grey and is completely free of defects. Carvings depicting a sinuous, winding serpent are traced along each side of the blade.

Unique Wpns.Name: Bloodpike
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Bloodseeker: wielder can, as a reaction, make a standard attack against any target that enters into this weapon's range with a -30 penalty.
Unique Wpns.Description: A wicked black pike which ever-so-subtly draws all exposed blood towards itself. Both blade and haft seem to drink in blood on contact.

Unique Wpns.Name: Nightbane
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Illusory: -10 to evade against this weapon
Unique Wpns.Description: A wavy, shadowy sword that can, at times, glow with a faint violet light

Unique Wpns.Name: The Unseen
Unique Wpns.Additional Effects: Spellbound: wielder gains the ability to cast the Invisibility psychic power using the weapon's WP of 57
Unique Wpns.Description: A stark blueish-black blade like a spike, with a single glowing fleshy eye bulging out of the hilt.

Uniques.Name: 5x Buglike Xenos heads on a string
Uniques.Description: chitinous heads that manage to somehow look both completely alien and yet somehow aberrantly human.

Uniques.Name: Alien organ in a stasis chamber
Uniques.Description: A strange, distended Xenos organ of some kind, suspended in a stasis pod. Its tell-tale rythmic beat can, somehow, be heard from outside the pod.

Uniques.Name: Ancient Astartes Power Armor
Uniques.Known Mechanics: As Artificer Power Armor
Uniques.Description: Taken from the tomb of Sentikal Blayne. Ancient Luna Wolf armor

Uniques.Name: Archaeotech Preysense Goggles
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Best-quality Preysense Goggles that inflict -5 Awareness when used in Darkness, but add +2 DoS to any successful Awareness check in these conditions
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Anzion's Pseudogenitor
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Counts as Medical and Manipulator mechadendrites. Unique melee wpn profile
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Cantic Thrallnet
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Allows for a direct mental link to Adeptus Mechanicus servitors, servo skulls, and other AdMech automata. Once per round, the user can as a FrA either grant Inspiration to 1 linked ally or grant all linked allies the benefit of one talent they possess.
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Case of Cybernetics
Uniques.Known Mechanics: 2 Best-quality cybernetic arm disguised as human skin--1 with an inbuilt compact grenade launcher and the other an inbuilt compact hot-shot laspistol, a pair of best-quality cybernetic eyes that are disguised as human eyes and count as memorance implants, a locator matrix implant, and a small set of surgical tools for cybernetic installation.
Uniques.Description: The case exterior is unmarked, but the interior has a barely-noticable serial number on the inside of the case rim.

Uniques.Name: Chalice of Sorrow
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Charon Battle Servitor
Uniques.Known Mechanics: As Murder Servitor, but with 25 Wounds, 9 AP All, and a Power Axe + Heavy Flamer with the Hulking Trait
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Chivalry
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Hat which can be used as Smoke Grenade.
Uniques.Description: Has a name sewn onto the inside.

Uniques.Name: Crystal Skull
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Bearer can, as a FrA on their turn, store the results of any roll on the psychic phenomena table within the skull. The bearer may spend a FrA to trigger the stored psy phenom at any time (though the skull must be within WB score in meters and the bearer must possess a psy rating). If the skull is currently storing a Psy Phenom, no additional phenomena may be stored.
Uniques.Description: A gleaming human-esque skull made out of glimmering purple crystal. Taken from a strange crashed Ork.

Uniques.Name: Dragon's Tooth
Uniques.Description: A massive dragon's tooth. Traditional tokens for the Skaaldir, these teeth are often carved and formed into daggers or the hilts for personal weapons

Uniques.Name: Egarian Puzzle Cube
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Solving the puzzle allows the user to bond to an Egarian mentat
Uniques.Description: Perfect cube with strange sliding plates

Uniques.Name: Eldar Histories
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Can train FL(Eldar)+0 after studying these books for 3 time increments(with a successful Linguistics(Eldar)-10 check)
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Fhaisorr
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Bonded character gains 1 FP. If the Fhaisorr is ever killed, lost, or otherwise un-bonded, this FP is lost. While in communication with the Fhaisorr, the bonded character can spend 1 FP as a Half Action to gain 70% shield until the end of their next turn or see a vision of possible deaths ooc. Each initial use of the ability AFTER THE FIRST IN ANY SESSION inflicts 1 Insanity, and successive uses in a single encounter inflict additional Insanity...
Uniques.Description: A small, color-shifting bird.

Uniques.Name: Flying sphere
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Sphere falls against gravity
Uniques.Description: Tiny perfect metal sphere

Uniques.Name: Gemstones in Glass
Uniques.Known Mechanics: PR+2 for one pwr use. Recharge ???
Uniques.Description: Tiny shards of strange gemstones are embedded in perfect, unbreakable glass spheres. They glow with warp-light.

Uniques.Name: Hesperidan Sapling
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Touching the tree can remove bad memories and insanity
Uniques.Description: A perfectly-white tree grown from an unknown fruit from Hesperida

Uniques.Name: Ingot of Iridescent Metal
Uniques.Description: A mysterious ingot of metal with a strange oily sheen. Melts in the cold, but is diamond-hard when heated above 30 C.

Uniques.Name: Karelian Repulsor
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Provides 25% field with 01 Overload. Targets which charge the bearer must test S-20. Other targets moving into melee must test S+0.
Uniques.Description: An ancient field generator linked with a light repulsor field

Uniques.Name: Large Brass Cog
Uniques.Description: 1 meter in diameter, and embossed/embellished with gothic-esque script

Uniques.Name: Lux-Equine
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Summons Lux-Equus creature.
Uniques.Description: A small, glowing white horse made out of what appears to be solid light

Uniques.Name: Map of the Reach
Uniques.Description: An ancient map of the Reach. Features 4 circled systems.

Uniques.Name: Morrowine
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Drastically boosts memory/recall, but colors all memories with deep sorrow
Uniques.Description: An ink-black liquid suspended in a primitive glass-esque bottle.

Uniques.Name: Mysterious Jet-black stone
Uniques.Known Mechanics: One side of stone is reflective and seems to show things that are not physically there
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Prismatic Fist
Uniques.Known Mechanics: As Cybernetic hand. Integrates several weapon profiles: Contains built-in Hotshot Las, Plasma, and Melta pistols
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Red and Blue Flags
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Seems to warp the minds of those who spend too much time near them...
Uniques.Description: Heraldry of the 343rd Mechanized Infantry and the 49th Recon (both from Chinchare) during the end of the 37th millennium. During Abbadon's 6th Black Crusade, the units were deployed on maneuvers to the death world of Prosan for training exercises. Unbeknownst to most, one of the units intended to turn traitor and support Abbadon's war effort. However, when the war came, both units were too invested in their bitter rivalry to heed their respective calls to battle--and thus they continued their meaningless wargame on a strategically useless backwater while the sector burned around them; bringing aid to neither side. At the end of the conflict, they were cursed by both the Dark Gods and the high priests of the Imperium (for their ineptitude, by Khorne, and for their lack of faith, by the Lord High Ecclesiarch). Executed to the man, the spectres of both regiments found themselves cursed to forever live out their eternal, fruitless struggle (constantly reliving episodes of their strange conflict). Both banners have, despite their ignominious origins, been taken up as unit banners for contemporary forces--but each time, those who bear these banners always seem to relive the struggles of their cursed, insane forebears

Uniques.Name: Retribution Bolt Shells
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Ammunition for Bolt weapons: In all respects, these count as bolt shells and can be loaded into a non-astartes Bolt weapon. However, in the round following a successful hit, they will deal their damage again as the secondary charge explodes. 30 shells.
Uniques.Description: These shells are each marked in High Gothic with tiny, inscribed incantations and blessings, as well as the markings of an obscure Adeptas Sororitas chapter.

Uniques.Name: Rough pink crystal
Uniques.Description: Impossibly hard pink crystal. Cannot be removed/reduced/cut by weapons

Uniques.Name: Sanctified Box
Uniques.Description: Taken from Xerak's office.

Uniques.Name: Sanghelos Combat Armor
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Common-quality Light Power Armor with 1/2 the normal weight, AP+1 to all locations, no strength bonus, no power requirements, doesn't increase size by 1 level, built for ~+2ft ~+150lb larger xenos
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Shattered Hilt of Indridi's Blade
Uniques.Description: A warped, blackened greatsword hilt. One of the most legendary weapons in the entirety of the reach. Ruined hilt worth at least 1pf. If reforged, worth a lot more.

Uniques.Name: Strange Tree Branch
Uniques.Description: Tree branch run-through with what looks like layers of silver. 5 Perfect silver leaves are still attached.

Uniques.Name: Sunshot rounds
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Targets hit suffer -30 to Stealth and grant +10 to hit them. Awareness +20 to detect them in the dark. Can be used with Autoguns, Autopistols, and comparable SP weapons.
Uniques.Description: Nondescript ammo, but slightly warm to the touch and glows lightly in the dark

Uniques.Name: Vanishing Fabric
Uniques.Description: A strange xenos fabric with a greenish metallic sheen. Parts of it appear and reappear randomly.

Uniques.Name: Void-Stalker Cloak
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Stealth + 30 and automatic success on Stealth in darkness or dim light.
Uniques.Description: A light, soft black cape made of some sort of xenos hide. It always remains slightly warm to the touch

Uniques.Name: Wayfarer's Browncoat
Uniques.Known Mechanics: AP 2 to Arms, Body. Grants Unnatural BS(4). This ability is suppressed if the bearer uses AP from a different set of armor.
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Whispersilk Cloth
Uniques.Description: A swath of nearly weightless fabric taken from the Slaaneshi blademistress

Uniques.Name: Wraithbone Flute
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Seems to produce strange, alien sounds
Uniques.Description: A carved wraithbone flute, with Eldar runes along the base.

Uniques.Name: Xenos Death-Dream's Fragment Multikey
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Made out of some mind-bending purple crystal, this key is at one enthralling and elusive. It acts as a best-quality multikey but requires an Ordinary Int test to use it. Success grants an additional +10 to use, failure inflicts 1 Insanity. Awareness checks to locate this item suffer -20
Uniques.Description: TBD

Uniques.Name: Ancient Manual of (Poxian) Health
Uniques.Known Mechanics: ??? (might improve one reader's Toughness permanently)
Uniques.Description: Some warp-infused tome crafted by unknown hands. Its initial page claims to be able to grant the dedicated reader a permanent infusion of vitality

Uniques.Name: Da Squiggin' Stick
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Single-use. This item may be used once to allow the bearer to make an opposed WP check with a single living (non-machine, non-daemonic) target within range and line of sight; on failure, that target is permanently transformed into a squig. Affected targets may burn a fate point to reduce this permanent effect to a temporary one
Uniques.Description: Yuri's package is wrapped in a strange thin parchment covered in depictions of grotesque abhumans with enormous eyes positioned in strange ritual poses. The item within appears to be a single long tooth--taken from some unknown beast--with a small, oddly-soft squig doll speared on the end. When squeezed, it creates an odd squealing sound that echoes off the walls far longer than it should.

Uniques.Name: Da (smol) Red Buttun
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Single-use. This item may be used once at the start of the bearer's turn to allow them to make an immediate Operate(Surface or Aeronautica) test. Upon success, this immediately allows any vehicle they are driving to perform a single vehicular action of the driver's choice. The vehicle also doubles its movement speed for a number of minutes equal to their DoS on the check
Uniques.Description: Rico's package is wrapped in colored parchment depicting some of Pox's strange nocturnal flying mammals. The item inside appears to be a single large, gently glowing red button dangling several wires which--presumably--used to connect to some sort of holy machine. The button seemingly begs you to press it.

Uniques.Name: Annuver Wun
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Single-use. This item summons an additional Ogg to the user's location. This Ogg may have varying weaponry and traits, but will (probably) stick around to help you for a little while. If you're in combat, he'll even (most likely) fight your enemies too!
Uniques.Description: Ogg's package is a tiny sphere wrapped in purple paper. Inside, suspended in glass, is what looks like a miniature figure of Ogg--one which glows when exposed to warp energy

Uniques.Name: Paint (fer) da Targut
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Single-use. Designate a vehicular target within throwing range, then attempt a BS test versus the target. On success, you and all allies gain +10 to hit the target until the end of the current combat. Additionally, you may choose to enter a Frenzy on a successful hit--if you do so, instead of gaining bonuses to WS, you instead gain those bonuses to BS and must attack the painted target if possible
Uniques.Description: Gnaeus' package is a wrapped wooden box, from which leaks a blueish sticky substance. Inside the box itself Gnaeus finds a single large paint can, labelled "umie paint"

Uniques.Name: Da  Boss' Hittin' (er Trowin) Stik
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Single-use. The user may, after declaring an attack (either thrown or melee) action, use this item to replace a single improvised weapon's attack profile with the weapon profile of any applicable melee (or thrown/grenade) weapon known to the party (unique weapons excluded, unless a party member is currently in possession of that item).
Uniques.Description: Jack's present was a hastily wrapped...stick? Yup, it's a stick. A weirdly thick one, too. There's a rock stuck on one end as well? Great. Just great.

Uniques.Name: Journal of the Von Zarovich Dynasty
Out of Mind: Meaning and the Making of Realities via Exploration of Psyko-Spatial Phenomena
Mysterious Instruction Manual
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Tome
Uniques.Description: Strange alien instructional manual discovered in with the vault of strange weapons on Castor. En route to the Exousia.

Uniques.Name: Tome of Alaric
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Tome
Uniques.Description: A blood-smeared tome bound in what appears to be stitched leathers taken from a wide array of creatures. Whispers can be heard when nearby...

Uniques.Name: Glyphs of the Collector
Uniques.Known Mechanics: Identifies the bearer as an ally to some faction of the mysterious Necrons
Uniques.Description: A small disc made of some unknown smooth black metal. It appears to glow--extremely faintly--in the dark.

Uniques.Name: Freendship Circly Thing
Uniques.Known Mechanics:
Single-use. This item may be used once to allow the bearer to make a WP test as a free action. For every Degree of Success (up to a maximum equal to their Psy Rating), the character may select one willing ally within LoS who, for the purposes of talents/traits/powers counts as an Ork until either the end of the encounter, session, or arc (player's choice). During this time, the caster gains a random psychic power from the Weirdboy psychic power table and may cast that power until this item's effects wear off. After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
Uniques.Description: Talvdin's package is a simple necklace ending in a string of...teeth carved into the shapes of Talvdin's allies. A small reservoir of power could be detected in the charm; breaking it could unleash the power on Talvdin's allies...

Uniques.Name: Da Gitfinda
Uniques.Known Mechanics:
Single-use. This item may be used once as a Free Action to give a single pistol carried by the wielder the ability to make their next Single-shot attack through an obstructing surface of up to 1m in width (up to 15 points of this obstruction's AR is ignored for the purposes of this single shot). When using the Gitfinda the character can form line of sight to the target--for purposes of firing the weapon only--if these conditions are met. The weapon gains the Recharge property for this attack (and thus cannot be used to attack next turn). After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
Uniques.Description: Rex's package was an improbably-curvy and yet blocky...scope? The lens at the end had a bright red reticle drawn in orky finger paint on it...yet somehow looking through the scope provided vision...of a sort.

Uniques.Name: Supa Hidin Gas
Uniques.Known Mechanics:
Single-use. This device functions as a grenade which may be only be deployed in the holder's current position as a Half Action Attack. Doing so immediately creates a smoke cloud of radius 10 centered on the bearer which lasts for 1d10+5 rounds AND which also pushes any other characters--friend or foe--to a position at least 5m away from the user. Additionally, this particular smoke cloud blocks Auspex sight, psychic abilities, and all vision granted by the Unnatural Senses trait. Shooting into or out of this dense smoke is extra difficult and inflicts a -40 penalty. After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
Uniques.Description: Uiyeldi's package is a big grey...cannonball? Some sort of ancient terran thing which appeared during the Farsight flash-tutoring on the Imperium. It was pain"pull mee to hide and get da gitz away"

Uniques.Name: Shoutin' Cone
Uniques.Known Mechanics:
Single-use. For one round, any uses of the Warrant of Trade or Officer abilities which affect a single target can affect up to FB targets within WPBx10 meters. After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
Uniques.Description: Harys' package is a simple...cone? The "instructions" crudely drawn on the side read "shout at ur freendz wiv dis and dey listen gud"

Uniques.Name: Da Fixit Rok
Uniques.Known Mechanics:
Single-use. The user may use any desired method to bring this rock into contact with a piece of technology (excluding vehicles, voidships, and similar items. Components of these may be valid targets). Said piece of technology--if malfunctioning in some way--immediately begins functioning properly for 1d10+WPB rounds--after which it resumes its original malfunctioning behavior. During this period the item in question is immune to additional effects which might cause further impairment or malfunction (such as Haywire fields). After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
Uniques.Description: Augustine's package was...a rock. Seriously. There was a tag attached to the rock with a drawing of an Ork using the Rok to "motivate" some large contraption. The Orkoid instructions indicated that the rock was somehow capable of restoring function to damanged or malfunctioning technology.

VS Upgs.Craftsmanship Changes: [P]: as N & spc-1; [G] as N & addl MM+2; [B] as N & addl MM+5

VS Etc.Name: Krakenslayer
VS Etc.Description: After slaying an ancient terror of the void, this vessel's machine spirit and crew are suffused with the spirit and prowess of sublime hunters, and are ever-watchful for hidden prey.
VS Etc.Effect:
This vessel gains the following:
1. Whenever the ship performs an Active Augury, you automatically gain the benefits of the Lock on Target action with all weapons aboard your vessel against any Hidden enemies specifically revealed by the Augury OR who were otherwise revealed from Hidden since the end of this vessel's last turn (this test is considered passed with the same DoS as the Active Augury action).
2. Increase the ship's detection by +20, but increase the power consumption of the ship's augur array by 2.
3. Increase the range of all Weapons installed aboard the ship by 2, but increase each weapon component's power consumption by 2. Does not apply to Torpedoes, Small Craft, or Nova Cannons.
4. Torpedoes fired during a round in which the ship performs only a default maneuver may benefit from the Lock on Target action(edited)

VS Etc.Name: Planetbound for Millenia
VS Etc.Description: TBD

VS Etc.Name: Thulian Explorator Vessel

VS Etc.Name: Veteran of the Angevin Crusade
VS Etc.Description: TBD
VS Etc.Effect: 3SP. BS+10. SR-40. Crew gain +10 to Charm/Intimdate in the right situations

VS Etc.Name: A Nose for Trouble
VS Etc.Description: Something about this ship quivers at the thought of battle, always probing the cosmos for a new victim.
VS Etc.Effect: Detection +5, Armor-1. Occasionally, the crew may find themselves in fights they might've preferrred to avoid...

VS Etc.Name: Adventurous
VS Etc.Description: The vessel is eager to seek new horizons, to turn its bow from civilisation and delve into the darkness of the unknown
VS Etc.Effect: When in endeavor gain Det+10, but Det-10 otherwise

VS Etc.Name: Ancient and Wise
VS Etc.Description: This ship is of a bygone age, having survived many millennia of voyages and adventures. It's hull has weakened over the centuries, but it anticipates the needs of its crew, and will mvoe as one with a competent master
VS Etc.Effect: Ship suffers -4 Hull Integ but Manuv+10

VS Etc.Name: Blasphemous Tendencies
VS Etc.Description: Some unidentifiable aspect of this vessel's spirit resonates sympathetically with the Immaterium. Captains find this ship swims through the warp more easily, as if it was more at home there...
VS Etc.Effect: Navigation(Warp)+15. All crew aboard suffer -5 to WP tests

VS Etc.Name: Martial Hubris
VS Etc.Description: The ship has a glorious legacy of warfare and triumphant combats. It is always eager to fight, and unwilling to back down
VS Etc.Effect: BS+5, Operate(Voidship)-15 tests to escape combat

VS Etc.Name: Rebellious
VS Etc.Description: This vessel does not suffer authority willingly. At times it seems to take pleasure in interfering with the plans of its masters.
VS Etc.Effect: During <=1 space combat per session GM should randomly select 1 component to become unpowered until repaired. However, ship ignores crits on 1d10 roll of 8+

VS Etc.Name: Resolute
VS Etc.Description: There is little in the universe that can stagger this vessel. No matter the foe, it will advance slowly but surely to meet it.
VS Etc.Effect: Ship suffers Spd-1 but gains Hull Points+3 and Repair+10

VS Etc.Name: Skittish
VS Etc.Description: The ship fears battle, bucking against its masters when entering the fray. When in combat, reduce the ship's Speed by 1. However, when not in danger, it runs eagerly and fast
VS Etc.Effect: Reduce travel time for long voyages by 1d5 weeks (min 1)

VS Etc.Name: Stoic
VS Etc.Description: The vessel behaves like a beast of burden, plodding but reliable
VS Etc.Effect: Reduce PF gain by 1. When comp damaged/unpowered, 1d10 roll of 7+ ignores

VS Etc.Name: Temporally Unmoored
VS Etc.Description: Past and present, cause and effect, now and not--these vessels seem to have a complicated relationship with time itself...
VS Etc.Effect: If destroyed, as long as at least one vessel with this Complication is still intact, the others reappear at its location 4 months after destruction with 10 CP. Every 4 days, crew mysteriously disappear from and reappear on active (non-destroyed) ships with this Complication: add up the total CP on all relevant ships, then evenly distribute it among each qualifying vessel.

VS Etc.Name: Wrothful
VS Etc.Description: The ship's spirit constantly smoulders with anger. In battle, it explodes into a berserker fury, straining and exhausting its systems
VS Etc.Effect: In combat gain Spd+1 and Manuv+7. Out of combat Spd-1 and Manuv/Det-5

VS Etc.Name: Death Cult

VS Etc.Effect: Reduce Max CP by 8. Reduce all Morale loss by 2. Officers must be wary of this sort of crew...

VS Etc.Name: Emissary of the Imperator
VS Etc.Description: The vessel is a veritable monument to the power and gradeur of the God-Emperor's might. Awe-inspiring and terrible, it lacks subtlety.
VS Etc.Effect: Intimidate by crewmembers +15, all other social -5. Applies if character is known to be from this vessel. Few will be able to see beyond the symbolism of the ship...

VS Etc.Name: Finances in Arrears

VS Etc.Effect: Crew must collect 50 extra pts to complete an Endeavor. Ship's financier also supports expeditions with supplies

VS Etc.Name: Haunted

VS Etc.Effect: Max Morale -10, Detection+6. All non-crew suffer -10 to Cmd aboard the bessel

VS Etc.Name: Mercenary Corps

VS Etc.Effect: Permanently reduce morale by 5 and increase any source of morale loss by 1. Also gain +5 BS, +1 Mv, and +10 Maneuv

VS Etc.Name: Mysterious Death Cult
VS Etc.Description: Amongst the low-decks indentured crew, strange beliefs have proliferated in the absence of the Emperor's light...
VS Etc.Effect: Reduce Max CP by 10. Reduce all Morale loss by 2. Officers must be wary of this sort of crew...(this may have other effects)

VS Etc.Name: Reliquary of Mars
VS Etc.Description: Somehow this vessel has been outfitted with ancient archaeo-tech systems from mankind's forgotten past.
VS Etc.Effect: When constructing, select 1 Archeotech component. TechUse tests to repair suffer -20. The tech priests of mars also regard the vessel as holy...

VS Etc.Name: Temperamental Warp Engine
VS Etc.Description: The ship suffers a flutter in its warp engines, an inconsistency that no amount of maintenance or supplication can eliminate.
VS Etc.Effect: When warp trvl, GM rolls 1d10. 6- journey takes +1d5wks, 7+ takes 1d5 fewer. Once in a great while, the ship will emerge somewhere else entirely...

VS Etc.Name: The Fourth Protocol
VS Etc.Description: These vessels seem entirely crewed by servitors. Hmmmm...
VS Etc.Effect: All who board the ship and stay for more than 24 hours are mysteriously servitorized, giving this vessel a Best-quality Servitor Crew upgrade that is not restricted in its potential sources of new crew. There are likely other effects...

VS Etc.Name: Turbulent Past
VS Etc.Description: Over the years this ship has been used to perform deeds dastardly to some and heroic to others.
VS Etc.Effect: GM selects social group, crew suffers -20 to social vs that group. GM selects 2nd group opposed to the first and crew gain +20 to social with that group

VS Etc.Name: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
VS Etc.Description: Beneath this vessel's unassuming exterior is a dangerous spacefaring predator.
VS Etc.Effect: Captain selects 3 Components. When scanned or inspected in any way except the most thorough, these Comps will either not register or appear to be a different Comp of the same type. Ship suffers -2 Power. Ship might also have other secrets...

VS Etc.Name: Wrested from a Space Hulk
VS Etc.Description: The ship has been recovered from a space hulk - a mass of wrecked ships that drifts intermittently through the warp and realspace. The ship is very old (and thus of high quality), but those who know of its origins whisper that it is currsed.
VS Etc.Effect: Armor+1, Spd+1, Manuv+3. Misfortunes roll 2x and GM chooses the worse. This curse can have other effects as well...

VS Etc.Name: Xenophilious
VS Etc.Description: Through dealings with some xenos race, this vessel has been outfitted with examples of their blasphemous technology.
VS Etc.Effect: Select 1 Xenotech component during construction. TU to repair the ship suffer -30 (-10 for FL(Xenos) repairer). The forces of the Ordo Xenos have an interest in the vessel and its owner...
